questions.q: A small business usually has a limited budget for its advertising. Which of the following is the most suitable advertisement medium for a small business?
Explain the characteristics of a small business. (Any three characteristics) (7)
questions.answer: Small businesses are characterized by: limited resources, simple structure, and personal involvement of the owner.

questions.q: What are the advantages of small businesses in promoting self-employment and job opportunities in rural areas? (Any three) (10)
questions.answer: The advantages of small businesses in promoting self-employment and job opportunities in rural areas are: they provide employment opportunities to local residents, promote self-employment, and contribute to the local economy.

questions.q: A small business should have a well-planned marketing strategy to reach its target market. Fill in the blank: A small business should conduct _______________________ analysis to identify its target market.
Small businesses play a significant role in the economic development of a country. State any two reasons.
questions.answer: Small businesses play a significant role in the economic development of a country because: they promote entrepreneurship, and contribute to the GDP.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of small businesses in terms of their management structure?
questions.answer: The main advantage of small businesses in terms of their management structure is that they have a simple and flat organizational structure.

questions.q: A small business should have a well-planned production process to meet the changing needs of its customers. True or False: Small businesses should have a flexible production process.
Explain the significance of small businesses in promoting rural development. (Any three) (8)
questions.answer: The significance of small businesses in promoting rural development is: they provide employment opportunities to local residents, promote entrepreneurship, and contribute to the local economy.

questions.q: A small business should have a well-planned financial plan to meet its financial needs. Fill in the blank: A small business should prepare a _______________________ statement to forecast its future financial needs.
State any two characteristics of a small business. (Any two) (3)
questions.answer: Two characteristics of a small business are: limited resources, and personal involvement of the owner.
